title: cypripedium × andrewsii var. landonii
intro: Cypripedium × andrewsii var. landonii, also known as Landon's Lady's Slipper, is a rare and unique orchid species that is a hybrid of Cypripedium andrewsii and another Cypripedium species. This orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cypripedium × andrewsii var. landonii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and crushing the roots, leaves, and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions.
